definition.p_early_foul_trouble: P(2+ personal fouls by end Q1 (10:00) OR 3+ PF by end H1 (20:00)) -- the standard coaching in-foul-trouble heuristic
definition.minutes_at_risk: E[minutes lost to fouls] = max(0, mean(min|foul-OFF) - mean(min|foul-ON)) on the same seed stream (causal, foul channel only)

card.title: Foul-Trouble Watch
card.hide_trivial: card_show=true when p_early_foul_trouble >= 0.10; lower-risk bench players are carried (card_show=false) but hidden by default
card.excluded_out: OUT / unavailable players were excluded upstream at sim time (absent from this feed by construction)

labels.league_avg_estimate: foul_rate_basis='league_avg_estimate' -> no real per-36 foul rate for this player; ran on a league-average foul-rate prior. Label the row as an estimate.
labels.player: foul_rate_basis='player' -> player's own per-36 foul rate (eb_foul_per36) used.
